meta.description: Hourly cron. For every IAML program instance whose '4 PM local on end_date' has passed, mints evaluation rows for each confirmed attendee (respecting skip_block_eval) and emails them the evaluation link via SendGrid. Idempotent — safe to re-run. NOTE (2026-04-21): Direct execution in n8n currently errors at startup with no node results; use scripts/send-eval-batch.js as a fallback. Root cause TBD.
